name: canvas-test-run-all
description: Orchestrates the full Canvas test suite: runs canvas-test-page-building, canvas-test-nested-components, canvas-test-content-template, canvas-test-per-content-editing, and canvas-build-page (regression). Reports pass/fail status for each test and overall summary.
preconditions: Test scripts are in capabilities/tests/ and generator scripts in capabilities/generators/
Active default theme SDC components are available
